summary: Iteration 26 features fully tested. All features working: 1) Admin user detail shows step data for completed steps (name, phone, address, Fachgebiet displayed inline). 2) Multiupload fields show document type + download link. 3) Step editor type dropdown has 5 options including Partner-Mehrfachauswahl. 4) Typ-Einstellungen tab appears for partner_selection/multiselection/milestone/display types. 5) Fields tab only for form type. 6) Global tabs always visible. 7) Demo doctors seeded with Fachgebiete. 8) Step 1 has 15 medical specialties. 9) Added DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} endpoint for test cleanup. 10) All TEST_ prefixed data cleaned up.
passed_tests: ADMIN USER DETAIL: Dr. Anna Schmidt user detail shows step data (Name=Schmidt, Vorname=Anna, Telefon=+49 170 9876543, Adresse=Hauptstr. 12, 80331 München, Fachgebiet=Allgemeinmedizin)
ADMIN USER DETAIL: Progress section shows completed steps with form data inline
ADMIN USER DETAIL: Steps without data show no data section
STEP EDITOR: Type dropdown shows 5 options: Formular, Partner-Auswahl, Partner-Mehrfachauswahl, Meilenstein, Anzeige
STEP EDITOR: Select 'Partner-Mehrfachauswahl' → Typ-Einstellungen tab appears with Filter-Tag field
STEP EDITOR: Select 'Formular' → Fields tab appears, Typ-Einstellungen tab hidden
STEP EDITOR: Select 'Meilenstein' → Typ-Einstellungen shows Ausstehend-Nachricht and Abgeschlossen-Nachricht fields
STEP EDITOR: Global tabs (Anforderungen, Mappings, Bedingungen, Benachrichtigungen) visible for ALL types
SEED DATA: Demo doctors exist (Dr. Anna Schmidt, Dr. Emre Yilmaz, Dr. Wei Chen, Dr. Priya Kumar)
SEED DATA: Dr. Schmidt has Step 1 completed with form data (Allgemeinmedizin)
SEED DATA: Step 1 Fachgebiet field has 15 medical specialties
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/steps with step_type=partner_multiselection creates step correctly
BACKEND: All 5 step types accepted by backend (form, partner_selection, partner_multiselection, milestone, display)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/users/{id} returns progress with data field
BACKEND: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} endpoint added for test cleanup
TEST CLEANUP: All TEST_ prefixed users deleted at end of test run
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / Admin123!, Demo doctors: dr.schmidt@example.com / Demo123!, dr.yilmaz@example.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: Demo doctors seeded: Dr. Anna Schmidt (Allgemeinmedizin), Dr. Emre Yilmaz (Innere Medizin), Dr. Wei Chen (Chirurgie), Dr. Priya Kumar (Pädiatrie) - all with Step 1 completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 complete. Key changes: 1) Admin user detail now shows step data inline for completed steps (like partner view) - each completed step displays its form data fields below the status dropdown. 2) Step editor type dropdown includes 'partner_multiselection' (Partner-Mehrfachauswahl). 3) Type-specific tabs: Typ-Einstellungen only for partner_selection/multiselection/milestone/display, Fields tab only for form. Global tabs always visible. 4) Demo doctors seeded with Fachgebiete and Step 1 completed. 5) Step 1 has 15 medical specialties. 6) Added DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} endpoint for test cleanup. 7) Test cleanup now deletes all TEST_ prefixed users at end of test run.
